prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 6422→7592→7342→6961→8388，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 1000 名；2025 年基准约 8388 名，为近年最高（位次数字最大）；该校在云南省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 47 人、2022 年 53 人、2023 年 59 人、2024 年 55 人、2025 年 59 人；2026 年计划 52 人，较 2025 年缩招约 11.9%，缩招通常使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 51 名，较 2021 年（第 56 名）稳步上升，学校综合实力与认可度持续提升；抖音热度排名第 21，评价「较热」，短视频曝光量较高；2023 年声誉曾因小语种专业位次下降 6211 位而偏负面，但近年未见明显负面舆情，整体关注度平稳偏暖；海洋科学 A+、水产 A+、食品科学与工程 A-、生物学 A-，海洋特色鲜明，相关专业对考生有特定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校招生专业大类社会热度「高热推荐」；本省 2026 年考生总数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年约 28.57 万大幅增长约 32.3%，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据 2026 年缺失，；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；云南考生赴外省就读意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为 985 高校吸引力稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、软科排名上升（增强吸引力）、本省考生大幅增加（加剧竞争）等多重因素，竞争加剧效应略强于缩招缓解效应；预测 2026 年理科最低位次约 7991 名，区间 7491–8491 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 6422→7592→7342→6961→8388, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8388, the highest in recent years (largest ranking number); the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan province for science/physics category was 47 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 59 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52, a reduction of about 11.9% compared to 2025, which usually eases competition slightly, making the ranking number smaller.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 51st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, steadily rising from 56th in 2021, indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition; ranked 21st in Douyin popularity, rated 'relatively hot', with high short video exposure; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative due to a 6211-place drop in minor language majors, but no significant negative public opinion has been seen in recent years, overall attention is stable and slightly positive; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Food Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, with distinctive marine characteristics, attracting specific interest from candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other major categories in the university's enrollment are 'highly recommended' in social popularity; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% from about 285,700 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference; Yunnan candidates' willingness to study in other provinces is influenced by regional preferences, but the university's status as a 985 institution provides stable attraction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attraction), and the significant increase in local candidates (intensifying competition), the competition intensification effect is slightly stronger than the easing effect of the enrollment reduction; the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 7991, with a range of 7491–8491.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information Class (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Science
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Marine Technology
- Atmospheric Science
- Biological Science Class (including Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science)
- Materials Class (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Food Science and Engineering Class (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Aquaculture
- Chemistry
- Geology
- Finance
- Financial Management
- Logistics Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7491–8491, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7491), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Class and Electronic Information Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8491), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 51 名，近年排名稳步上升，学校综合实力持续增强；抖音热度「较热」（总排名第 21），短视频曝光量较高；2023 年声誉曾因小语种专业位次下降而偏负面，但近年整体声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；海洋科学 A+、水产 A+、食品科学与工程 A-、生物学 A-；文科招生专业以法学、汉语言文学、工商管理、财务管理等为主，与学校海洋特色学科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度「分化观望」、汉语言文学「推荐」、工商管理「明显劝退」；本省 2026 年考生总数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年约 28.57 万大幅增长约 32.3%，历史类考生按比例估算约 14.85 万，较 2025 年 11.24 万增长约 32%，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据 2026 年缺失，；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；云南考生赴外省就读意愿受地域偏好影响，但该校作为 985 高校吸引力稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的波动惯性、2026 年计划大幅扩招 60%（显著增加录取名额）、本省考生大幅增加（加剧竞争）等多重因素，扩招效应占主导但考生大增部分抵消；预测 2026 年文科最低位次约 3181 名，区间 2681–3681 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1736→1477→1690→1206→2302, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, it reached the best in recent years (1206th), but in 2025, it dropped sharply to 2302nd, the worst in recent years, with a fluctuation range of about 1100 places; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan Province for liberal arts/history category was 16 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a substantial increase of 60% compared to 2025, significantly boosting admission opportunities, with ranking numbers trending larger.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 51st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; Douyin popularity 'relatively hot' (21st overall), with high short video exposure; in 2023, reputation was somewhat negative due to a decline in rankings for minor language majors, but overall reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Food Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-; liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Financial Management, etc., which are weakly related to the university's marine specialty disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social popularity 'divided and wait-and-see', Chinese Language and Literature 'recommended', Business Administration 'clearly discouraged'; the total number of examinees in this province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% from about 285,700 in 2025; history category examinees are estimated proportionally at about 148,500, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, intensifying competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference; Yunnan students' willingness to study in other provinces is influenced by regional preferences, but the university's attractiveness as a 985 institution remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation inertia of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the substantial 60% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (significantly increasing admission slots), and the large increase in local examinees (intensifying competition), the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by the surge in examinees; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 3181, with a range of 2681–3681.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 2681–3681, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<2681), you can aim for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Political Science and Administration; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>3681), you should primarily choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
